⁠PT NFT brainstorm?⁠
We could create a new pool that this is the only way to deposit.

I just thought of a really cool way to potentially run an Affiliate/referral program: When you mint an NFT, you can preset an outgoing commission level for the creator of the NFT, for every time the NFT is resold. They have that standard on Opensea and other platforms. So, we set it up that people can mint their own Official PT NFTs; not Only do those NFT's hold slots (like charged particles) where other wallets can deposit USDC (The whole NFT represents 1 wallet that pays out factionally, when it wins prizes.) But, also the one who originally minted the NFT gets an ongoing 2,5,10% of the whole payout when the NFT allocation wins. People must may be required to hold POOL to be able to mint! You have to hold more POOL to mint the NFT that gives and ongoing 10%...
So what does the future integration between Tribe and PT look like?

So, if POOL was exchanged for valuable NFTs, those NFTs would not have any inherent liquidity value. But, they Can be divided up into shares, and those shares can be resold and given away as prizes. The total income from selling the shares would be floated in to the pool(s). It functions like a mini pod.
NFTs can also be divided into fractional ownership shares, and also be loaded with the value of other coins. As in like we are taking about in the ⁠PT NFT brainstorm?
